category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Norway EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入挪威：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入挪威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Norway (SN/NVE/Statnett) and EEA CE framework expectations (via EEA Agreement), including IEC 61851, IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, AFIR (EU 2023/1804) implementation via the EEA Agreement, electrical protection-device requirements (including Norway's historically mixed IT/TN earthing environment), and national installation rules. Norway has the world's highest per-capita EV adoption rate, making AFIR and connector compliance actively enforced.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与挪威（SN/NVE/Statnett）及EEA CE框架要求（通过EEA协议）对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、通过EEA协议适用的AFIR（EU 2023/1804）、保护装置要求（含挪威历史上混合IT/TN接地环境）和国家安装规则。挪威是全球人均电动汽车普及率最高的国家，AFIR及接口合规要求受到积极执行。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與挪威（SN/NVE/Statnett）及EEA CE框架要求（通過EEA協議）對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2相容性、通過EEA協議適用的AFIR（EU 2023/1804）、保護裝置要求（含挪威歷史上混合IT/TN接地環境）和國家安裝規則。挪威是全球人均電動汽車普及率最高的國家，AFIR及接口合規要求受到積極執行。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Norway (SN/NVE/Statnett) and EEA CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行挪威（SN/NVE/Statnett）及EEA CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行挪威（SN/NVE/Statnett）及EEA CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Norway-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented via the EEA Agreement, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection (noting Norway's historically mixed IT/TN earthing environment requiring Type B RCD compatibility verification), and NVE/DSO grid coordination. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness. Norway's world-leading EV market means AFIR and connector compliance requirements are enforced rigorously.
answer_first.zh: 对于挪威市场电动汽车充电桩，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、通过EEA协议实施AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护（注意挪威历史上混合IT/TN接地环境要求核查B型RCD兼容性），以及NVE/配电运营商并网协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备。挪威作为全球领先的电动汽车市场，对AFIR及接口合规要求执法严格。
answer_first.zht: 對於挪威市場電動汽車充電樁，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2接口一致性、通過EEA協議實施AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護（注意挪威歷史上混合IT/TN接地環境要求核查B型RCD相容性），以及NVE/配電運營商併網協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備。挪威作為全球領先的電動汽車市場，對AFIR及接口合規要求執法嚴格。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
